entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop focused on for seed production and productivity improvement in Ethiopia

entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: The country where the innovative partnership approach for chickpea seed production was implemented

entities.name: SEED PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of producing seeds for agricultural use

entities.name: TECHNOLOGY DISSEMINATION
entities.description: The process of spreading agricultural innovations and technologies to farmers

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output, specifically the yield of chickpea per hectare

entities.name: QUALITY SEED
entities.description: Seeds that meet specific standards of purity and germination to ensure better crop performance

entities.name: FARMERS' PARTICIPATORY VARIETY SELECTION
entities.description: An approach where farmers are actively involved in the selection of crop varieties

entities.name: FARMERS' SEED PRODUCER ASSOCIATIONS
entities.description: Organizations formed by farmers to produce and market quality seeds

entities.name: SEED SYSTEM
entities.description: The network of actors and processes involved in the production and distribution of seeds

entities.name: GRAIN VALUE CHAIN
entities.description: The full range of activities required to bring a grain product from the field to the consumer

entities.name: CERTIFIED SEED
entities.description: Seed that has been officially verified to meet quality standards
